package.name: quad_sim
package.description:
Simulation-specific package for GPS-denied quadcopter. Contains ONLY launch files and simulation config. All actual flight logic lives in quad_core.
Launch files: sim_base.launch.py : Phase 1 — starts DDS agent sim_offboard.launch.py: Phase 2 — starts offboard hover sim_vio.launch.py : Phase 3/4 — starts VIO + mission
